mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.id id,c.text as name,c.parent_id parent_id,c.create_time create_time,c.sort_key,c.img_url,c.menu FROM sys_role_user ur, sys_role r, htht_role_category rc,htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c WHERE ur.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID AND r.ROLE_ID = rc.role_id AND rc.category_id = c.id AND ur.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY c.sort_key ASC;
SELECT id as value, name as label FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product` where tree_id in ( SELECT id FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_data_category` WHERE parent_id = #{id} )

SELECT DISTINCT c.parent_id FROM sys_role_user ur, sys_role r, htht_role_category rc,htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c WHERE ur.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID AND r.ROLE_ID = rc.role_id AND rc.category_id = c.id AND ur.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT c.id id, CONCAT(hcs.text,"_",c.text) as name,c.parent_id parent_id,c.create_time create_time,c.sort_key FROM sys_role_user ur, sys_role r, htht_role_category rc,htht_cluster_schedule_data_category c LEFT JOIN htht_cluster_schedule_data_category hcs on c.parent_id = hcs.id WHERE ur.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID AND r.ROLE_ID = rc.role_id AND rc.category_id = c.id AND ur.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY c.sort_key ASC
-- SELECT -- id,parent_id,name,sort_key -- FROM -- `htht_data_category` -- where -- tree_key = #{identify} -- ORDER BY -- sort_key -- ASC
